hero.value: Software Engineer at iOPEX Technologies. I build reliable, scalable products end to end — bridging solid backend logic with clean, intuitive interfaces.

intro.heading: Let me <1>introduce</1> myself
intro.p1: I'm a Software Engineer who turns ideas into reliable, scalable products — with a real passion for high-performance systems and clean, intuitive interfaces.
intro.p2: I work across the full stack and gravitate toward systems that aren't static: real-time updates, complex UIs, lots of moving parts. I like going deep — optimizing and refining until things feel fast, clean, and right.
intro.p3: Always learning, always up for a challenge. So if you're building something interesting or technically demanding, I'd love to be part of it. 😄

card.p1: I'm <1>Harish Siva</1>, a <3>Software Engineer</3> based in Chennai, India, currently working with the software engineering team at <5>iOPEX Technologies</5>.
card.p2: I hold a degree in <1>Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering</1> from <3>Panimalar Engineering College</3>, which gives me a strong grounding in systems thinking that carries over into how I design and build software. My focus is on developing scalable, maintainable applications and solving practical problems with clean, efficient code.

github.heading: Days I Code
github.sub: My public GitHub contributions over the last year.

showcase.heading: Things I've <1>built</1>
showcase.lead: A selection of projects I've worked on — the problems they solve and the parts I built.

EIB.description: A centralized internal platform that brings an organization's employee information together in one place — from day-to-day logistics to offboarding and a complete, searchable view of every employee's data.

iC.description: An internal HR / employee portal (HRIS) for iOPEX — a personalized hub that brings a configurable home dashboard, a photo & video gallery, and company announcements together in one place, across web and mobile.

contact.heading: Let's <1>talk</1>
contact.lead: Have a project, a role, or just a question? Drop me a message below, or ping me on WhatsApp for a real-time chat.
contact.asideCopy: Prefer a quick chat? Message me on WhatsApp — no form needed.

form.name: Name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me a little about what you have in mind…
form.success: Thanks! Your message has been sent — I'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again, or reach me on WhatsApp.

connect.heading: Find me <1>online</1>
connect.lead: Always happy to connect — whether it's about work, tech, or a good game of cricket.
